title: hieracium lazistanum subsp. vandasii
intro: Hieracium lazistanum subsp. vandasii, also known as Vandas' hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium lazistanum subsp. vandasii include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
